events.text: {"decision":"fail","risk":"critical","work_stage":"in-progress","component_conditions":["non-compliant"],"percent_complete":0,"value":0,"sound_source":"","confidence":0.95,"event_time":0,"rate":0,"order":[],"workable":[],"findings":["Personnel riding in equipment bucket — prohibited unsafe use of material-handling equipment under OSHA 1926 Subpart O."],"actions":["Stop work immediately; remove personnel from bucket; require proper personnel platform/aerial lift or ladder access per manufacturer and OSHA requirements.","Conduct safety stand-down and retrain crew on Subpart O requirements; verify equipment operator qualifications and manufacturer's operating instructions."],"rationale":"Riding in a bucket not designed/approved for personnel transport is a serious OSHA Subpart O violation and immediate life-safety hazard; not acceptable journeyman practice.","references":["OSHA 1926 Subpart O - Motor Vehicles, Mechanized Equipment, and Operations","OSHA 1926.602 - Material handling equipment","OSHA 1926.21 - Safety training and education"]  }
